seoTitle: How to View Starred Templates in Canva
metaDescription: Learn how to star and quickly find your favorite templates in Canva to speed up your design workflow.
intro: Constantly searching for the same templates wastes time you could spend designing. This tutorial shows how to star templates in Canva and quickly access them later, keeping your workflow organized and efficient.

steps.heading: Navigate Canva's template library
steps.body: Browse Canva's templates to find the ones that fit your recurring design needs.

steps.heading: Star your favorite templates
steps.body: Mark templates with a star so they're easy to find again without searching from scratch.

steps.heading: Locate your starred templates
steps.body: Access your starred collection whenever you need to quickly reuse a favorite layout.

steps.heading: Use this for consistent team workflows
steps.body: Apply starred templates for scenarios like recurring social posts or branded presentations where consistency matters.

faq.question: Can I unstar a template later if I no longer need it?
faq.answer: Yes, you can remove the star from any template at any time to clean up your saved list.

faq.question: Are starred templates shared across a team account?
faq.answer: This depends on your Canva plan and team settings, as some starred collections may be personal rather than shared.

faq.question: How many templates can I star?
faq.answer: There's generally no strict limit mentioned, so you can star as many templates as are useful to your workflow.

faq.question: Does starring a template change its design in any way?
faq.answer: No, starring only affects how easily you can find the template again — it doesn't modify the template itself.
